<!-- 1-3 bullet points describing the change -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] docs: Documentation
- [ ] test: Tests
- [ ] chore: Maintenance
- [ ] perf: Performance

## Related Specs
<!-- Link SF-* spec IDs this PR implements -->

## Test Plan
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated (if UI change)
- [ ] Coverage >= 80%

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets in code
- [ ] All inputs validated
- [ ] SQL queries parameterized
- [ ] Outputs escaped (XSS)
- [ ] Error handling explicit
- [ ] Structured logging (no console.log/fmt.Println)
- [ ] Mobile-first tested at 320px (if UI)
- [ ] WCAG AA accessible (if UI)
